title: Les disparus de St. Agil
writer: Jean-Henri Blanchon, Victor Hugo, Jacques Prévert
actors: Erich von Stroheim, Michel Simon, Armand Bernard
plot: Strange things happen at night at the St. Agil secondary school. Baume, Sorgue and Macroix - three of the school's pupils - discover a suspicious man on the premises. Shortly after this unsettling event, pupils begin to go missing.
